assessment.roster_rule: live mode uses current roster/stat/injury APIs only

game_assessment.roster_rule: live mode uses current roster/stat/injury APIs only

away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Sabrina Ionescu
players.injury_comment: "She is progressing well," DeMarco said. "We kept her home so she can continue to play 5-on-5 with the practice guys, which is standard practice for us before we can fully clear a player for game action." Ionescu has missed the past six games, but a return against the Dream on Thursday appears to be on the table.

players.name: Jonquel Jones
players.injury_comment: Jones is a late scratch with an illness and will miss her first contest of the campaign. The star center's next chance to play comes Thursday versus Atlanta. Han Xu and Satou Sabally are candidates for increased workloads in the frontcourt.

players.name: Anneli Maley
players.injury_comment: Maley will sit out Monday's contest in Connecticut to preserve her eligibility while signed to a developmental pact. Her next chance to suit up will come Thursday in Atlanta.

injuries.name: Jonquel Jones

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Brittney Griner
players.injury_comment: Griner had a fantastic showing in Friday's 85-80 loss to Chicago, though she won't suit up Monday due to a nagging rib injury that has plagued her throughout the 2026 campaign. It appears Aaliyah Edwards (concussion) is set to return after missing the last three games, which should help lessen the blow caused by Griner's absence. Olivia Nelson-Ododa could also be in line to move into the starting lineup for the second time this season.

players.name: Ashlon Jackson
players.injury_comment: The Sun are preserving Jackson's eligibility under a development contract. Her next chance to play comes Wednesday in Toronto.

players.name: Aneesah Morrow
players.injury_comment: After being absent from the initial injury report, Morrow is being downgraded to out due to a left leg strain. She can be deemed day-to-day ahead of Wednesday's tilt in Toronto. Kennedy Burke, Olivia Nelson-Ododa and Nell Angloma are all candidates to replace Morrow in the starting lineup.

players.name: Hailey Van Lith
players.injury_comment: Van Lith will sit out Monday's contest in an effort to preserve her eligibility while signed to a developmental contract. Her next chance to suit up will come Wednesday in Toronto.
